quality_assessment.completeness: Complete. Contains slug, name, class, level, description, and subclass flag.
quality_assessment.clarity: High. The description clearly details the benefit (increase scores by +2 or two scores by +1) and the recurrence pattern (4th, 8th, 12th, 16th, 19th levels).
quality_assessment.mechanics_accuracy: Accurate. This feature mirrors the standard Player's Handbook (PHB) Ability Score Improvement (ASI) granted to Paladins.

effect_options: Increase one ability score by 2 (up to a maximum of 20).
Increase two different ability scores by 1 each (up to a maximum of 20 for each).
mechanics_review.notes: This is a core class progression feature providing necessary power scaling. The constraint on increasing scores above 20 is correctly noted.

analysis.archivist_summary: The data is high quality, consistent, and accurately reflects the mechanical rules for the Paladin's Ability Score Improvement feature, including all specified recurrence levels and constraints.
